caption: A man with long dark hair tied back and wearing glasses performs in an indoor setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark vest with blue embroidery, and a red beaded necklace. He stands behind a microphone on a black stand and holds a light-colored acoustic guitar. In the background, horizontal blinds cover a window or wall. The foreground shows the back of several people's heads, including individuals with blonde and white hair, who are watching the performance. The text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the screen. Across the frames, the man continues to sing into the microphone, with slight shifts in his facial expression and posture, while the audience remains still.
